_meta.notes: Skills catalog — Phase 5 Day 23-24. Each skill is gated by a trainer NPC (learnedFromNpc — see content/npcs/<id>.json with metadata.teachesSkill). XP curve is `level = floor(sqrt(xp/50))` — see lib/economy/skills.ts. Casual play hits L5 in a session, L10 in a week, L20 is a brag. Each skill maps to specific recipe categories (smithing → smith-* recipes, alchemy → alchemy-* recipes, etc.) and gather affinities (mining → ore, woodcutting → wood, farming → herb).

skills.label: smithing
skills.description: Heat, hammer, fold. The bones of every weapon and tool.

skills.label: smelting
skills.description: Coax metal out of stone. The first step before any blade.

skills.label: alchemy
skills.description: Steam, decoction, the careful weighing of things bitter and sweet.

skills.label: farming
skills.description: Seeds, soil, weeding, the patience to wait. Also the cord and the bowl.

skills.label: woodcutting
skills.description: Chop, mill, square. Every handle started here.

skills.label: mining
skills.description: Read the stone, find the seam, swing without breaking the wrist.

skills.label: cooking
skills.description: Salt, smoke, fire. The work of keeping people alive past today.
